definition: Direct mechanical impact by a runner blade/vane/structure; includes leading-edge contact
typical_evidence: Strike-probability/velocity models; strike-rig tests; lacerations/bruising/severed bodies

definition: Injury from rapid pressure change (nadir) over-expanding swim-bladder gas
typical_evidence: Pressure-chamber dose-response; nadir/RPC metrics; swim-bladder rupture/exophthalmia/emboli

definition: Injury from steep velocity gradients (shear layers/jets/draft tube)
Vapour-bubble formation and collapse at low local pressure
Chaotic flow disorienting fish and raising strike/shear exposure
Fish crushed/abraded in narrow gaps (runner-hub; screw-trough)
Total dissolved gas supersaturation causing gas-bubble trauma
Exposure pathway: drawn toward intakes or pinned on screens/racks
